title: Report『特化鍛錬による可能性』

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I win a ticket to an Umamusume martial arts show
during a shopping trip.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Hoping to learn a thing or two, I go to watch.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...I'm leaving. I'd be better off lifting weights
myself than watching this.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Why make assumptions when the match
hasn't even begun?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
So much for "performing an observation-based
analysis of athletic aptitude concerning muscular
fitness." The heck is all this?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I only care about running. I'm not watching some
primitive fistfight.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If you wanted to sit around sipping juice, enjoying
shows—you should've brought a friend.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I think both races and fights share a commonality
in the sense they both require physical movement.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hah, please.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... hey! Everyone here is crowding me in—I
can't leave like this.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But of course! It's a really popular match. Rather
than worrying about the turnout, turn your gaze
to this Umamusume fighter. What a body!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I have some hypotheses as to how she developed
those muscles, but I wonder how she will use
them... This is so exciting!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hey, are you listening to me?! Tch, I guess I have
no other choice...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, the match begins.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The show of power and speed at hand scales far
beyond human limits. The crowd is stirred into a
frenzy.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: What did you think, Shakur?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Their physical coordination was next-level.
Whatever they're doing to train, it's better than
any method I know.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Makes me wonder how they'd do in a race. They
wouldn't beat me, obviously, but I bet they'd put
up a decent challenge.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I see, I see! And?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I guess... regardless of your path, all athletes are
fighting an uphill battle with their physical limits,
trying to climb the mountain to the top.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Trying to reach the top of one's own mountain,
eh? Now that's poetic! Tell me what else you've
learned.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Tch. I've already said too much.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I'm outta here.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And where do you think you're going? I'm sure
there are a few more poems inside you. Please, I'd
love to hear more!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Would you just shut up for once?!
